creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update summary to include Dell system issue with FreeBSD 11.1 from (duplicate) bug 199754

Re-open issue, has been in progress since 2013.

All users reporting issues should re-test and report if symptoms continue to be reproducible on the latest versions of supported FreeBSD releases (ideally including CURRENT), and include:

- Full uname -a output
- Dell system information
